arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man Utd to go head-to-head in transfer battle for Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United are on a collision course as they both seek long-term replacements for their respective left-backs, according to reports. Andy Robertson has been a stalwart for the Reds over the past seven years, playing over 300 games for the club across all competitions and winning Premier League, Champions League, FA Cup and […] The post Liverpool and Man Utd to go head-to-head in transfer battle for Bournemouth star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Club chief reveals failed move for Man Utd midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Christian Eriksen has been confirmed as a recent summer target for Anderlecht by the Belgian club's chief executive for sport. Eriksen has admitted that he would have been open to leaving Old Trafford if the club had told him there were no prospects for him at United .

arts.ttl: Anthony Martial breaks silence on move after making Man Utd feelings VERY clear
arts.sum: Anthony Martial has finally found a new club after spending the last few months unemployed following his Manchester United exit and has now spoken out after putting pen to paper on a move

arts.ttl: Who is Martin Baturina? The 'new Luka Modric' wanted by Man Utd and Real Madrid
arts.sum: Being a midfielder from Dinamo Zagreb, it would always be hard for a youngster to avoid comparisons to Luka Modric but the tag is well-suited to Croatian wonderkid Martin Baturina . Baturina initially came through the academy of Hajduk Split before eventually going on to join rivals Dinamo as a 14-year-old, which saw him feature through in Croatia’s youth teams from the under-15s and beyond.

arts.ttl: Man Utd new boy Noussair Mazraoui details talent that could save club millions
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui plays primarily as a right-back at Manchester United but is capable of playing in a number of positions after starting in the Ajax academy, where youngsters are taught to play fluidly
